trigger: mechanism_simulation robustness axis contains below-threshold diagnostic rows
recommended_action: Use the mechanism simulation suite as a ground-truth stress test, not as a universal method ranking.

trigger: output_dimension robustness axis contains below-threshold diagnostic rows
recommended_action: Check whether the conclusion changes when the output dimension is increased beyond two.

trigger: perturbation robustness axis contains below-threshold diagnostic rows
recommended_action: Check whether dropout or noise stress changes the claim-support diagnostics.

trigger: upstream_pca robustness axis contains below-threshold diagnostic rows
recommended_action: Check whether graph or relational layouts depend on the supplied PCA reference space.

trigger: PHATE global_rank_corr falls below threshold under at least one tested robustness condition
recommended_action: Inspect dimension response, upstream PCA response and perturbation curves before using this method for the associated claim.
source_definition: Derived from worst-case Fig6 robustness metrics across predeclared conditions.
